plain_english_rule: Lesion ID must not be blank and should follow T01/NT01/NEW01 convention.
Same lesion ID should not represent two different lesion identities for the same subject.
Every tumor result lesion ID in TR must exist in TU.
Diameter results must be numeric and have a unit.
Numeric measurements should be standardized to mm for comparison.
Method changes across visits should be verified.
PR should be supported by sufficient target lesion decrease.
New lesion presence should agree with new lesion response and overall response.
Overall CR should not conflict with persistent non-target disease.
